title: Themadhood.github.io
subtitle: Scalable web platform for Themadhood projects and systems
description: A scalable web platform designed to host and organize all Themadhood projects and systems.
Built as a fast recovery solution after previous hosting platforms became unavailable, with plans to evolve into a full-stack system.
features: JSON-driven content system for easy updates
Central hub for all projects and branches
Designed for fast deployment and recovery
Planned migration path to full-stack architecture
statusDetails: Structure designed for future full-stack migration
Assets and pages being gradually restored

progressNotes: Initial hosting disruption and transition planning (Dec 2025 bitween Jan 2026)
Maintained multiple active sites across previous hosting platform.
Discovered hosting platform shutdown and loss of support.
Evaluated replacement options and recovery strategies.
Wix evaluation and limitations (Jan 2026 to Feb 2026)
Attempted to rebuild sites using Wix platform.
Encountered limitations with asset management and scalability.
Determined Wix workflow was too slow for project needs.
Rapid rebuild using custom scalable site (March 2026 to Early April 2026)
Designed and implemented a custom browser-based site system.
Built JSON-driven structure for dynamic content loading.
Focused on fast deployment to restore project visibility.
Re-established core pages and project structure.
Continuing to restore assets and project pages.
Preparing system for transition to full-stack architecture.
Planning backend integration for future scalability.
